text:
Once upon a time in the quaint town of Willow Creek, there lived a kind old owl named Oliver. Despite his wise wrinkles and owlhood, Oliver could never resist an adventure.

One moonlit night, Oliver heard whispers of something mysterious deep within Whispering Woods. They called it the Lost Gems—a collection of lost treasures. Oliver had to find them!

He flew south toward the forest. Along the way, he met a wise old owl named Henrietta. Henrietta said maybe he should ask for directions.

"Follow my feathers," she advised with a knowing glance. "I know paths."

So Oliver followed. After what felt like hours, he saw glitter beneath some old cherry trees. It was a key!

He opened it. Inside was a map!

Cheeses! Only cheese?! No. Follow the river. It bends!

He took to the water. After a while, he saw blue tiles sticking out among weeds. A hidden treasure cave!

He crawled inside.

There were bottles! They
